labels.description: Browse labels in use across wurkspaces, agent pools, registry modules, an registry provydurs. Read-only — labels iz edited on each entity's own page.

labels.emptyValues: No valyooz fur "{key}". Either no readable entity carries dis label, or it wuz removed since teh last view.

deprecated.body: Teh Labels browser iz no longer in teh main navigation an wil bee removed in a future release. Filter by label from teh <workspacesLink>Wurkspaces</workspacesLink> page instead. If u rely on dis page, plz <issueLink>open an issue</issueLink>.

interactive.label: Personal
interactive.help: A personal tokun fur teh CLI an ad-hoc automation. Carries yur full live permissions.

service_bound.label: Service · bound
service_bound.help: A service tokun scoped to a subset ov yur roles. Its access iz teh intersection ov doze roles an yur own — an it stops working if yur akownt iz removed.

service_detached.label: Service · detached
service_detached.help: An admin-managed service tokun wif an absolute pinned scope, bound to no hooman. Use fur critical machine-to-machine automation dat must survive any one person leaving.

form.pinnedRolesHelp: — teh scope dis tokun iz limited to

orphan.title: Orphan {name}
orphan.heading: Orphan {name}?
orphan.description: Dis deletes teh catalog instance record but does <warn>not</warn> destroy its infrastructure — teh provisioned rezorces keep running, <warn>untracked an unmanaged</warn>. Dis iz discouraged. To reclaim teh infrastructure, nvm an use <emph>Destroy</emph> instead.

fields.name: Naem
fields.nameTitle: Letters, numbers, hyphens, underscores. Must startz wif a letter or number.
fields.cpuRequestTitle: Kubernetes CPU quantity: whole cores (1, 2) or millicores (500m, 100m)
fields.memoryRequestTitle: Kubernetes memory quantity: bytes (1000) or wif suffix (512Mi, 2Gi, 1Ti)
fields.versionTitle: Vershun in X.Y or X.Y.Z format (e.g. 1.11 or 1.11.5)
fields.terragruntVersionTitle: Terragrunt vershun in X.Y or X.Y.Z format (e.g. 1.0)

fields.triggerPrefixesHint: Directories dat trigger runz. Overrides working directory filtering wen set.
fields.driftIgnoreRulesHint: Glob-aware Terraform address + attribute paths suppressed by teh drift classifier. <star></star> matches zero or moar non-<dot></dot> chars (spans <n></n> indices); <starIdx></starIdx> matches any bracketed index. A bare address wif no attribute suffix silences any change to dat rezorce — including destroys. Affects drift only, not regular plan/apply. See <docs>drift-ignore-rules.md</docs> fur teh full grammar.
fields.driftIgnoreRulesNone: None (every plan diff counts as drift)

vcsWorkflowWarning.title: Authorization delegated to yur VCS repository.
vcsWorkflowWarning.rbac: Anyone who can merge teh PR can apply. Branch protection rules (required reviews, statuz checks, code ownr approval) become teh gate. Terrapod role/label RBAC doesnot apply to comment-driven stuffs in dis mode.
vcsWorkflowWarning.recommended: Recommended: require linear history (rebase/squash before merge) so teh commit u apply iz teh commit dat lands.
vcsWorkflowWarning.credit: Credit: dis workflow iz modelled on <atlantis>Atlantis</atlantis>. Atlantis remains teh right tool fur teams who only want PR-comment-driven applies an no platform UI.

lock.title: Lock Statuz
lock.lockedDesc: Dis wurkspace iz locked. No plans or applies can runz.
lock.unlockedDesc: Dis wurkspace iz unlocked an ready fur runz.

drift.title: Drift Detection
drift.dismissTitle: Clear teh reported drift state. Teh next scheduled check wil repopulate it from reality.
drift.checkNowTitle: Queue a plan-only runz to check fur drift

planExpiry.title: Plan Expiry
planExpiry.description: Auto-discard an unconfirmed plan once it iz older than dis, so a stale plan kant bee applied against a moved world. Off by default; teh plan must den bee re-runz. (Applies to apply-capable runz only.)

aiSummary.title: AI Plan Summary
aiSummary.description: Automatic LLM-generated change summary, risk assessment, an failure analysis on every plan-phase outcome fur dis wurkspace.
aiSummary.contextPlaceholder: Facts teh AI shud know bout dis wurkspace specifically. e.g. 'Fronts teh vault fur service X — destroying teh KMS key causes a global outage.'
aiSummary.contextHint: Added on top ov deployment-wide context. Max 4000 characters.

slack.title: Slack notifications
slack.description: Opt dis wurkspace into Slack runz notifications — approval requests, applies, errors, an drift. Leave teh channel empty an dis wurkspace stays silent (dere iz no deployment-wide fan-out). Requires teh Slack app to bee on by an administrator.
slack.hint: Teh Slack app must already bee a member ov teh channel.

impact.subtitle: plan ov {count, plural, one {# rezorce} other {# rezorces}}
impact.hint: Each sphere iz a rezorce; each arrow points to wut it depends on. Click a node → its transitive impact (everything downstream) lights up.

estate.navHint: Drag to rotate · scroll to zoom · right-drag to pan · click a node to orbit around it

state3d.title: State graph
state3d.hint: Each sphere iz a rezorce; each arrow points to wut it depends on. Click a node → teh rezorces dat transitively depend on it light up.

resource3d.navHint: Drag to rotate · scroll to zoom · right-drag to pan · click a rezorce to orbit around it

delete.heading: Delet Execution Hook
delete.description: Permanently delet dis hook an yeet it from all wurkspaces.

workspaces.scopeNote: Dis hook runz only on teh wurkspaces associated below. Dere iz no global scope.
workspaces.empty: No wurkspaces associated wif dis hook.

confirm.removeWorkspace: Yeet dis wurkspace from teh hook? Teh hook wil no longer runz fur it.

policies.heading: Polisys ({count})
policies.vcsManaged: Managed by repository — push chanjes via PR
policies.empty: No polisys in dis set yet.

addPolicy.regoHint: Rego v1. Must declare package terrapod an express violations via a deny set. Teh plan iz input; Terrapod context iz data.terrapod_context.

confirm.deleteSet: Delet dis polisy set an all its polisys? Recorded runz evaluations iz kept.

confirm.prompt: Link dis Slack akownt to yur Terrapod identity? Every future Slack action (approve/discard) wil runz as dis Terrapod hooman wif dere permissions.
confirm.warning: Only continue if u just startd dis link from Slack yourself. If u didn't, close dis tab an don't link — dis binds teh Slack akownt above to yur Terrapod identity.

success.message: Yur Slack akownt iz nao linked to Terrapod.
success.linkedAs: Linked as {email}. U can close dis tab an return to Slack.

errors.missingLink: Missing or invalid link. Startz agin wif teh Terrapod link command in Slack.
errors.invalidLink: Dis link iz invalid, expired, or already used. Startz teh link agin from Slack.

success.title: Login Successful
success.complete: API tokun maded. U can close dis tab.

fallback.description: Could not reach teh CLI automatically.

timeout.description: Teh CLI may not haz completed teh tokun exchange. Check yur terminal.
